basics.name: Basics
basics.description: General knowledge base covering Polkadot overview content, core concepts, getting started guides, and beginner-level material for developers new to the ecosystem.

smart_contracts.name: Smart Contracts
smart_contracts.description: Developing and deploying smart contracts on Polkadot Hub, including Solidity development with EVM and PolkaVM, dev environments like Hardhat and Foundry, precompiles, and contract deployment tutorials.

parachains.name: Parachains
parachains.description: Building, customizing, testing, deploying, and maintaining parachains using the Polkadot SDK, including runtime development, pallet creation, coretime acquisition, and runtime upgrades.

accounts_and_transactions.name: Accounts & Transactions
accounts_and_transactions.description: Account creation and management, transaction construction and submission, fee calculation, token operations, and asset conversions across Polkadot-based chains.

interoperability.name: Interoperability
interoperability.description: Cross-chain communication using XCM, asset transfers between parachains, HRMP channel management, bridging to external networks, and cross-chain fee estimation.

infrastructure.name: Infrastructure
infrastructure.description: Running and maintaining node infrastructure, including validators, collators, RPC nodes, and bootnodes, along with staking mechanics, key management, and operational tasks.

polkadot_protocol.name: Polkadot Protocol
polkadot_protocol.description: In-depth protocol internals including consensus mechanisms, agile coretime, block production, transaction formats, cryptography, data encoding, and chain architecture.

tooling.name: Tooling
tooling.description: Developer SDKs and tools including PAPI, Polkadot.js, subxt, Dedot, light clients, testing frameworks like Chopsticks and Zombienet, and CLI utilities like Pop CLI.

reference.name: Reference
reference.description: Comprehensive reference material including glossary, governance structures, origin tracks, and detailed technical specifications for Polkadot Hub and parachain subsystems.
